LightningComponentBundle.description: A HOT-owned timeline component for Threads, Conversation Notes and Call Logs

property.name: timelineParentField
property.label: Timeline parent field
property.description: API name of the field containing the parent record ID (e.g. Id or CRM_Account__c)

property.name: customEmptySubtitle
property.label: Info message on empty list
property.description: If defined then used instead of the standard empty-state subtitle

property.name: amountOfMonths
property.label: Initial Months to show
property.description: Number of months to show on render

property.name: amountOfMonthsToOpen
property.label: No. of Months to Expand
property.description: Number of expanded months on render

property.name: amountOfMonthsToLoad
property.label: No. of Months to Load
property.description: Number of months to load when clicking Load More

property.name: amountOfRecords
property.label: Initial Records to show
property.description: Number of records to show for each expanded month on render

property.name: amountOfRecordsToOpen
property.label: No. of Records to Expand
property.description: Number of shown records to expand on render

property.name: amountOfRecordsToLoad
property.label: No. of Records to Load
property.description: Number of records to load when clicking See More and Load More. Max 30.

property.name: initialQueryLimit
property.label: SOQL limit of query on first load
property.description: SOQL limit on first render per table. Default 5. Max is 30.

property.name: includeAmountInTitle
property.label: Includes the amount of records in a month
